title: solanum wallacei var. clokeyi
intro: Solanum wallacei var. clokeyi, also known as Wallace's clokey nightshade or the purple nightshade, is a variety of flowering plant in the Solanaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory issues, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. Herbal preparations of Solanum wallacei var. clokeyi include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to make topical applications and internal remedies.
